SIGCOMM 2025 Papers Info

--- PAPER --- Session: Wireless and Mobile Networks Title: Example Wireless Dataset Paper Authors: Ada Lovelace, Grace Hopper Abstract: We use dataset named Open5G Measurements with RF measurements, SINR, and throughput traces. PDF: PDF ACM: ACM DOI: 10.1145/example
--- PAPER --- Session: Network Systems Title: Example Datacenter Congestion Paper Authors: Claude Shannon Abstract: This paper studies wired datacenter congestion control. ACM: ACM DOI: 10.1145/example2
